productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Check White Shirt
description: Style Note This impeccably designed shirt from indigo nation remains a timeless classic. Wear this with chinos or denims and style it with understated accessories. Product Details White checked shirt with hints of red and black with a spread collar, short sleeves with buttoned cuffs, pockets on the front with buttoned flaps, a full buttoned placket and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash cold Use mild detergent Flat dry in shade Do not wring, bleach, iron on print Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
